nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Internal-secret-gated. Accepts a bid intent from any source (tiktok_comment / facebook_comment / instagram_dm / web_form / sms / whatsapp), parses the raw text for a numeric amount, validates against the auction's min_increment + current high, and INSERTs into auction_bids. Outbid logic for the previous high bidder is handled here too. Body: { auction_id, source_platform, source_comment_id?, raw_input, bidder_trust_id }.
